purpose: Collect public poe.ninja PoE 1 Path of Building exports through the public API and decode them to validated XML by skill.
source_priority: poe.ninja public API pathOfBuildingExport decoded to XML
external public Path of Building export code decoded to XML
rules: Do not invent passive trees, items, gems, PoB configs, or DPS values.
Write only decoded public PoB XML that parses as XML.
Target up to 6 XML files per skill by default, with at most 1 XML example per character class for each skill.
Add/update only; never delete existing XML or metadata.
On HTTP 429, stop the current run.
Skip new XML for a skill when its character class is already represented by an existing sidecar JSON.
Record source URL, endpoint, league, version, snapshot, character, class, level, collected_at, and status in sidecar JSON.
